mechanism_narrative: A positive 3-month trend in retail sales signals improving household demand and near-term revenue momentum for listed firms, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:latest available RSAFS value at decision point was 355777
failure_condition: Reject if positive 3-month RSAFS growth is followed by nonpositive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 55% of walk-forward observations.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate rises sharply, expected household income and credit quality deteriorate, causing investors to mark down cyclical earnings and producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:latest available UNRATE value at decision point was 9.7
failure_condition: Reject if triggered UNRATE increases are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of triggered walk-forward instances.

mechanism_narrative: A federal funds rate crossing above a low-rate threshold marks the start of tighter discount-rate conditions, reducing equity valuation multiples and producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS crosses above 1.0% after being below 1.0% for at least 6 months
evidence_refs: fact:latest available FEDFUNDS value at decision point was 0.11
regime_hint: monetary tightening from zero lower bound
failure_condition: Reject if FEDFUNDS threshold crossings are followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of triggered cases.

mechanism_narrative: Joint acceleration in payroll employment and real GDP identifies a broad expansion in labor income and output, raising expected earnings and producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS 3-month change is positive and GDPC1 latest quarterly growth is positive
evidence_refs: fact:latest available PAYEMS value at decision point was 129527
failure_condition: Reject if the joint positive PAYEMS and GDPC1 signal has a 60-day forward hit rate below 50% or a negative average excess return versus unconditional periods.

mechanism_narrative: A contraction in industrial production signals weakening manufacturing output and inventory demand, reducing operating leverage for cyclical firms and producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:latest available INDPRO value at decision point was 100.3043
failure_condition: Reject if triggered INDPRO contractions are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of observations.

mechanism_narrative: A rebound in housing starts signals improving construction activity, durable goods demand, and household balance-sheet confidence, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST rises > 10% over 3 months after a prior 6-month decline
evidence_refs: fact:latest available HOUST value at decision point was 557
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST rebound triggers have nonpositive mean 60-day S&P 500 forward returns or a hit rate below 50%.

mechanism_narrative: When the policy rate is pinned near zero while unemployment is falling, monetary accommodation amplifies improving labor income, compresses discount rates, and produces positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS < 0.25% and UNRATE declines over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:latest available FEDFUNDS value at decision point was 0.11
failure_condition: Reject if the joint FEDFUNDS and UNRATE condition produces lower average 20-day S&P 500 returns than unconditional periods in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating consumer prices while the funds rate remains low signals rising inflation pressure before policy normalization, pressuring real margins and valuation multiples and producing negative S&P 500 returns over 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized change rises above its 12-month change while FEDFUNDS < 0.25%
evidence_refs: fact:latest available CPIAUCSL value at decision point was 217.541
failure_condition: Reject if the inflation-acceleration low-rate trigger has positive average 5-day S&P 500 returns or a negative-signal hit rate below 50%.
